title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kaido, Brook, Unknown person #14, Robin, Unknown person #15 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Robin-chan!! Save me!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: All of OnigaShima heard that laughing stock!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Blackfoot has your crew's second highest bounty?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That should tell you some- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: YOHOHOHOHOHOHO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Sanji-San truly is extra- ordinary!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Robin- San,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I assume you'd like to take it from here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I appre- Cate it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can leave the rest of these night demons to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Even though I'm scared of ghosts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Did I strike a nerve?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Not at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's a kind soul,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And you'll never under- stand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...just how much it means for him to rely on me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's one of the wings that'll allow the pirate King to Soar!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: GIGANTE FLEUR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Wano - Tokyoge port

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I need more meat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You already ate everything we had onboard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way we're gonna find more out here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You found him under- water?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That has to be a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We heard some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Luffy... I'm glad, you're really alive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fell down here just like we did...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shinobu's kite allowed us to escape from Kaido,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Luffy... Kin' Emon and Kiku, they... right in front of me they--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't the time for that! You're in charge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You can cry when it's over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We've still got to blow Kaido away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Luffy-Taro, how can you be so harsh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I won't lose this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh? Isn't that straw hat? I thought he was fighting?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I just need more meaaaat!! :-)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Okay, I guess I'll look for some!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he doesn't pull this off, I'll never get to leave this country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Come on, get it together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Oh, and momo...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're gonna take me up there to finish this...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: A final trip back to Onigashima!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need you to trans- form into a dragon and fly!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 44 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
